_README: Derived from docs/concept-art-brief.md. 'concepts' are the 6 narrative scenes (image stacks), each with a single 'description'. 'styles' are the art directions (one output folder each). 'variations' is how many distinct takes to generate per scene per style. Total images = concepts x styles x variations. global_guidance is appended to every prompt for series consistency.

character.description: The recurring PROTAGONIST is the SAME man in every scene where he appears: a friendly, distinguished man in his early 60s with light/fair skin, a warm approachable expression, and bright blue-green eyes. He is completely bald on top (smooth, clean scalp) and wears modern rectangular dark-rimmed eyeglasses. His signature feature is a very long, full, bushy beard that flows well down past his chest -- salt-and-pepper grey blending to silvery-white, slightly wavy and wispy toward the ends, fullest at the chin. He has a solid, stocky build and ALWAYS wears a plain black button-up shirt (his signature look). Keep his face, bald head, glasses, long grey-white beard, and black shirt consistent across images. He is the only person with this exact appearance -- any assistant, librarian, or teammates are clearly DIFFERENT people.

global_guidance: Cohesive series set in a cozy, modern, sunlit work-from-home office. COMPOSITION (important): the DESK and the items on it are the true subject and focal point of every scene -- frame the shot so the desk surface fills a large portion of the foreground and is clearly visible; people are secondary to the desk. Generous negative space so it reads on a projected 16:9 slide. Warm, aspirational, business-audience-friendly mood. No watermarks; keep any incidental text minimal and elegant.

Cinematic Photoreal.prompt: Warm editorial photography, shot on a full-frame camera with a fast prime lens: soft natural window light, gentle shallow depth of field, realistic textures and materials, a cozy aspirational lifestyle-brand look.

Polished 3D Render.prompt: A premium, friendly 3D-rendered illustration with modern animated-film production quality: soft global illumination, rounded tactile forms, matte materials, gentle ambient occlusion, approachable and clean.

Modern Flat Vector.prompt: Clean modern corporate flat-vector illustration: bold simple shapes, a confident limited palette with subtle gradients, crisp geometry, lots of negative space, a contemporary tech-brand editorial style.

Ghibli Anime.prompt: Hand-drawn Japanese animation style reminiscent of classic Studio Ghibli films: soft hand-painted watercolor backgrounds, warm pastel palette, gentle painterly lighting and lush detail, clean expressive 2D character linework with rosy cheeks and large soft eyes, fluffy clouds and cozy nostalgic atmosphere, whimsical and heartfelt, cel-animation look.

concepts.name: WFH Executive - The Baseline
concepts.description: The protagonist sits at a pristine, minimalist desk in a clean, bright, modern home office, relaxed and smiling, ready to work. The large desk dominates the foreground and is almost empty -- calm and uncluttered -- representing fresh, open processing space.

concepts.name: Active Working Memory - The Organized Desk
concepts.description: The protagonist, focused and content, writing notes with a pen. The desk fills much of the frame and holds two or three small, neat, perfectly orderly stacks of paper. Highly organized and efficient -- a healthy, light workload.

concepts.name: Context Rot - The Messy Desk
concepts.description: The protagonist, now visibly stressed and rubbing his temples. The desk dominates the foreground and is absolutely buried under messy, disorganized stacks of printed paper, open reports, and post-it notes spilling over the keyboard. Overwhelmed, slow, and drowning in information.

concepts.name: Vector Memory and the RAG Assistant
concepts.description: The protagonist's desk is prominent in the foreground. Behind it stands a beautiful floor-to-ceiling wooden bookshelf packed with hundreds of books. A SECOND, DISTINCT person -- an attractive, professional secretary-style assistant, clearly NOT the bearded protagonist -- stands at the bookshelf performing retrieval, holding a single photocopied chapter she just pulled. A magnifying-glass callout over the book spines reveals a detailed table of contents, with a glowing arrow pointing to one specific chapter topic.

concepts.name: The LLM Wiki - The 50-Page Digest
concepts.description: The protagonist's desk, now clean and organized, fills the foreground with the messy stacks gone. In the center of the desk sits the definitive company handbook: a friendly, modern, simple hardback book with a clean matte cloth cover in a warm approachable color -- the kind of nicely made keepsake guidebook you would gift to someone and they would keep in their backpack at all times. It is NOT a leather-bound Bible and has no religious connotation -- just a tidy, premium everyday hardback. In the background, a DIFFERENT person -- the 'Wiki Curator', clearly NOT the bearded protagonist: a handsome, friendly white Caucasian man in his mid-30s with short, textured dark brown hair with subtle frosted blonde tips on top, clear light blue eyes, light freckles across his nose and cheeks, and a neatly trimmed short beard and mustache, dressed in smart-casual everyday clothes (a crisp button-down or a casual sweater -- NO costume, NO superhero suit) -- works at a small side-table reviewing incoming mail, emails, and market reports and typing updates into a digital draft of that same handbook.

concepts.name: Supercharged Team Vision - Shared Memory
concepts.description: A wide grid of three or four different work-from-home offices, each with a DIFFERENT team member -- distinct people of varied age and gender (an operations manager, a sales rep, an HR director), none of them the bearded protagonist. Each desk is clearly visible in its panel, and on every desk sits a glowing, pulsing holographic version of the exact same employee handbook -- a friendly modern hardback, NOT a leather Bible. Glowing digital data lines stream from a central cloud hub, updating all the handbooks simultaneously in real-time. Perfect alignment -- futuristic but warm.

concepts.name: The Vector Library - Memory Itself
concepts.description: A beautiful, clean, well-organized library interior with NO people in it at all -- completely empty of any person. Floor-to-ceiling warm wooden bookshelves filled with neatly arranged books recede in tidy rows, lit by soft natural light from tall windows. Calm, orderly, and inviting, with generous open space. This represents vector-based memory: a vast, perfectly indexed store of knowledge waiting to be searched. No desk, no characters -- just the elegant library as the sole subject.

concepts.name: The Complete System - Labeled Anatomy
concepts.description: A clean, friendly cutaway 'anatomy of the system' infographic showing the WHOLE home office at once, with every component clearly visible and CALLED OUT WITH TIDY TEXT LABELS and thin leader lines. NO people are present -- the focus is entirely on the office parts. Label each element clearly: the DESK labeled 'Working Memory / Context Window'; neat paper stacks labeled 'Active Context'; the floor-to-ceiling bookshelf labeled 'Vector Memory (RAG)'; the friendly hardback handbook on the desk labeled 'LLM Wiki / Handbook'; a small side-table workstation labeled 'Curator (auto-updates)'; and a glowing cloud hub with data lines labeled 'Shared Team Memory'. A clean educational diagram that anyone can take away as the single concept summary -- elegant, balanced, easy to read on a slide.
